hero.tag: Web Development · Cloud Solutions · Internal Tools
hero.sub: A team of 15+ senior engineers turning ambitious ideas into production-ready software for clients across Vietnam, the US, and EU.

about.p1: We are a team of senior developers specializing in web development, cloud applications, and internal tools. Every member brings at least 4 years of hands-on experience delivering production systems.
about.p2: From modernizing legacy websites to architecting cloud-native platforms on AWS and Azure, we partner with businesses of all sizes across Vietnam, the United States, and Europe.
about.p3: We don't just write code. We solve problems, reduce costs, and build systems that grow with your business.
about.card1_desc: Modern, fast, accessible web experiences built with the latest technologies.
about.card2_desc: AWS and Azure deployment, migration, and infrastructure optimization.
about.card3_desc: Custom automation and tooling that streamlines your operations.

services.s1_desc: Modernize your existing website or create a brand-new web ecosystem. We build responsive, performant, and SEO-friendly sites and applications.
services.s2_desc: Deploy and manage your applications on AWS or Azure. Optimize infrastructure costs, migrate on-premise servers to the cloud.
services.s3_desc: Track traffic, protect from attacks, gather analytics, and generate actionable reports that drive business decisions.
services.s4_desc: Automate repetitive tasks and build custom internal tools tailored to your specific business requirements.

map.desc: We work with clients across Vietnam, the United States, and Europe — delivering high-quality solutions regardless of timezone.

clients.intro: We've partnered with companies across industries — from energy and semiconductors to embedded systems — delivering projects that make a real impact.
clients.footer: And many more companies across Vietnam, the US and EU.

team.intro: Every developer on our team brings 4+ years of professional experience. We work closely with clients, communicate clearly, and ship reliable software.
team.desc1: Specializes in React, Node.js, and system architecture. Leads complex projects from concept to production.
team.desc2: AWS and Azure expert. Designs resilient infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and cost-optimized architectures.
team.desc3: Focused on APIs, databases, and microservices. Builds scalable systems that handle production workloads.
team.desc4: Crafts pixel-perfect UIs with accessibility in mind. TypeScript, React, and modern CSS advocate.
team.desc5: Builds internal tools and automation. Handles security audits, monitoring, and analytics integrations.
team.more: ...and 10 more talented engineers on our team

contact.intro: Have a project in mind? Tell us about it and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
